titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of Trusts and Estates, Yale University, Records
Office of Trusts and Estates, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday October 2, 2018 at 07:00
finding aid revision description not supplied

did.unittitle: Office of Trusts and Estates, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of completed files of individual trusts and estates maintained by the Yale Office of Trusts and Estates.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Finance and Administration

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 5-B (YRG 5-B), Accounting records and records of the Yale comptroller.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Yale Office of Trusts and Estates, 2004-2018.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of Trusts and Estates, Yale University, Records (RU 960). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of completed files of individual trusts and estates maintained by the Yale Office of Trusts and Estates.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Finance and Administration

did.unittitle: Completed files on individuals' trusts and estates
Records of completed files on individuals' trusts and estates
Pooled income fund statements and accounting transfers

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: Box 28 Folder 351: Jayne, Harold P. & Melgaard, Edna Trusts, has been returned to the Office of Trusts and Estates permanently.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: Box 26 Folder 287: Douglas, Richard Alexander Estate, has been returned to the Office of Trusts and Estates permanently.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: Box 41 Folder 511: Melon, Paul Estate, has been returned to the Office of Trusts and Estates permanently.

did.unittitle: Ken Dayton, Oak Leaf Endowment trust files
Gift, Bequest, and Life Income records
Card catalog of treasurer files and other financial records
Gift, Bequest, and Life Income records
